records.text: function addMessage(role,text) { const log=$('chatLog'); const div=document.createElement('div'); div.className='message '+role; div.textContent=text; log.appendChild(div); log.scrollTop=log.scrollHeight; }
$('chatForm').addEventListener('submit',e=>{ e.preventDefault(); const input=$('chatInput'); const prompt=input.value.trim(); if(!prompt)return; input.value=''; sendChat(prompt); });

$('studyChatForm').addEventListener('submit',e=>{ e.preventDefault(); const input=$('studyChatInput'); const prompt=input.value.trim(); if(!prompt)return; input.value=''; sendChat(prompt,state.selectedProfessor); });
The Observatory watches the current computer, FOXAI, runtime status, and what KayocktheOS can do in this session.

body { margin: 0; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #123312, var(--bg) 55%); color: var(--text); font-family: "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif; }

.bootScreen { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #123312, #020402 70%); display: grid; place-items: center; z-index: 99; transition: opacity .45s ease, visibility .45s ease; }
.bootCard { width: min(520px, 90vw); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 28px; padding: 34px; background: rgba(6,16,6,.86); text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(0,255,102,.12); }
.bootBar { height: 10px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.08); overflow: hidden; margin-top: 18px; }
.bootBar span { display: block; height: 100%; width: 8%; background: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--accent); transition: width .5s ease; }
.sidebar { border-right: 1px solid var(--border); background: rgba(5,12,5,.88); padding: 22px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 22px; }

.sigil { width: 48px; height: 48px; border: 1px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 14px; display: grid; place-items: center; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 900; font-size: 24px; box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(0,255,102,.12); }
.brand h1 { margin: 0; font-size: 20px; } .brand p { margin: 3px 0 0; color: var(--muted); font-size: 12px; }
.nav { background: transparent; color: var(--text); border: 1px solid rgba(149,215,149,.14); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; font-size: 15px; }
.sidebarStatus { margin-top: auto; display: grid; gap: 10px; color: var(--muted); font-size: 14px; }
.dot { display: inline-block; width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 99px; margin-right: 8px; }

.dot.ok { background: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--accent); } .dot.wait { background: var(--warn); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--warn); } .dot.bad { background: var(--bad); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--bad); }
.topbar { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 22px; }
.bell { background: rgba(0,255,102,.08); border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,102,.24); color: var(--text); border-radius: 999px; padding: 10px 14px; cursor: pointer; }

.bellPanel { position: absolute; top: 78px; right: 24px; width: 360px; max-height: 450px; overflow: auto; background: rgba(6,16,6,.96); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 18px; padding: 16px; z-index: 20; box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.36); }
.bellPanel.hidden { display: none; } .bellPanel h4 { margin: 0 0 12px; color: var(--accent); }
.eyebrow { text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .14em; color: var(--muted); font-size: 12px; margin: 0 0 4px; }
.operator { text-align: right; color: var(--accent); } .operator small { display: block; color: var(--muted); }

.hero { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 24px; padding: 28px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(18,36,18,.95), rgba(5,10,5,.92)); display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 18px; }
.statusPill { border: 1px solid var(--warn); color: var(--warn); border-radius: 999px; padding: 12px 18px; font-weight: 900; }
.statusPill.ok { color: var(--accent); border-color: var(--accent); } .statusPill.bad { color: var(--bad); border-color: var(--bad); }

.missionCard { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 18px; align-items: center; border: 1px solid rgba(149,215,149,.16); border-radius: 18px; padding: 20px; background: rgba(13,26,13,.7); margin-bottom: 18px; }
.missionCard h4 { margin: 4px 0 6px; font-size: 24px; } .missionCard p { margin: 0; color: var(--muted); }
.primaryBtn, .ghostBtn { border: 1px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(0,255,102,.12); color: var(--accent); padding: 13px 18px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 900; }
.grid { display: grid; gap: 18px; } .grid.two { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(280px, 1fr)); } .grid.three { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(220px, 1fr)); }
.card { background: rgba(13,26,13,.86); border: 1px solid rgba(149,215,149,.16); border-radius: 18px; padding: 20px; }
.sectionHeader { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 14px; } .sectionHeader h4 { margin: 0; }
.badge { border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,102,.28); border-radius: 999px; color: var(--accent); padding: 8px 12px; font-weight: 800; }
.item { padding: 9px 10px; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(0,0,0,.22); border-left: 4px solid var(--warn); }
.item strong { display: block; } .item span { color: var(--muted); font-size: 13px; }
.capLine { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 140px 1fr 34px; gap: 10px; align-items: center; }
.capBar { height: 8px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.08); overflow: hidden; }
.capBar span { display: block; height: 100%; background: var(--accent); min-width: 2px; }
.capabilityCards, .professorGrid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(230px, 1fr)); gap: 14px; }
.capabilityCard, .professor { background: rgba(0,0,0,.18); border: 1px solid rgba(149,215,149,.14); border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; transition: transform .2s ease, border-color .2s ease; }
.capabilityCard .icon { font-size: 30px; } .capabilityCard h5, .professor h5 { margin: 10px 0 6px; color: var(--accent); font-size: 19px; }
.capabilityCard p, .professor p { color: var(--muted); } .capabilityCard .score { color: var(--warn); font-weight: 900; }
.studyTop { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 86px 1fr auto; gap: 18px; align-items: center; }

.professorSeal { width: 72px; height: 72px; border: 1px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 24px; display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 30px; color: var(--accent); background: rgba(0,255,102,.08); }
.tag { border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,102,.25); color: var(--accent); border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 10px; background: rgba(0,255,102,.06); }
.questionGrid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.question { text-align: left; border: 1px solid rgba(149,215,149,.16); background: rgba(0,0,0,.22); color: var(--text); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px; cursor: pointer; }
.chatLog { height: 230px; overflow: auto; display: grid; gap: 10px; align-content: start; padding: 12px; background: rgba(0,0,0,.22); border-radius: 14px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.message.user { border-left: 4px solid var(--warn); } .message.assistant { border-left: 4px solid var(--accent); } .message.system { border-left: 4px solid var(--muted); color: var(--muted); }
.chatForm input { background: rgba(0,0,0,.35); color: var(--text); border: 1px solid rgba(149,215,149,.2); border-radius: 12px; padding: 13px; }
.chatForm button { background: rgba(0,255,102,.14); color: var(--accent); border: 1px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 800; }
